title: Stop-hook verdict enforcement mechanism (#368)
context: The end-of-change verdict was surfaced to the developer only on PASS; fail/inconclusive went to stderr (model-only) and exit-2 is a no-op on a Stop hook. How hard should a failed verdict bite?
rationale: User chose block+visible receipt: the real 'never ships hidden-FAILED' guarantee, aligned with the no-git/CI enforcement mandate; bounded by the stop_hook_active loop guard + block cap.
